use_cases: Trigger actions in forms, dialogs, and navigation menus
Submit or reset form data with variant-specific styling
Navigate between pages or sections with styled links
Enable destructive actions like delete with red-tinted variant
Create icon-only buttons for compact UI elements
ai_summary: A reusable button component with 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling with subtle shadows and rounded corners. Supports disabled states and focus-visible outlines for accessibility.
